object_a.label: picture frame
object_a.long_form_open_description: Medium-sized square picture frame with a darker border and a nautical-themed image (sailboat) centered on the stair wall at about eye level. Matte and frame create a small shadow on the wall.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Hangs on the sloped stair wall between two other framed pictures and above the baseboard
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Medium-sized square picture frame with a darker border and a nautical-themed image (sailboat) centered on the stair wall at about eye level. Matte and frame create a small shadow on the wall.

object_b.label: cabinet
object_b.description: kitchen cabinets and built-in appliances along back wall
object_b.long_form_open_description: A run of dark-stained upper and lower kitchen cabinets with stainless steel appliances (fridge, oven) visible; cabinets have modern hardware and a backsplash area is faintly visible. The kitchen occupies the background center portion.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Located behind the kitchen island along the back wall of the open plan
